title: HG Hob Cleaner Spray, Induction, Ceramic & Gas Hob Shine & Degreaser – 500ml
features: HG Hob Cleaner: A ceramic, induction, gas and electric hob cleaner to quickly and easily remove food and drink splashes, dust, stains, oil, burnt on food, grease and grime after cooking or frying
Removes food remnants on all hob types: As well as swiftly tackling food and oil marks before they start to stain, the kitchen hob cleaner spray also works as a light limescale remover and descaler
Fresh fragrance: The cleaner has a refreshing scent, leaving your stove top looking sparkling clean and smelling fresh. Also suitable as a an aga hob cleaner, microwave cleaner and oven glass cleaner
Won't damage your appliance: The kitchen cleaner spray is a fast-acting kitchen surface cleaner, safe for metal and glass. Ideal as a BBQ cleaner, grill cleaner, or for daily cooker top cleaning
1 x HG Tile Cleaner X Strong, 1L. Discover the HG cleaning product range, from HG grout to LVT floor cleaners, kitchen sprays, mould remover, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG Hob Cleaner spray is an effective gas, electric, induction or ceramic hob cleaner that can be used for the daily cleaning of stove tops and cookers. The hob cleaner quickly and easily removes grease, oil, scale and more, whilst leaving a fresh-smelling fragrance. The kitchen spray quickly and easily removes day-to-day dirt, such as grease splashes, cooking liquids, and mild scale from the hob, making it an effective daily degreaser and polish, which won’t damage your cooker top. The versatile kitchen cleaner is tough on oily marks but gentle on surfaces, meaning you can also use it as an indoor grill or barbecue cleaner. Includes: 1 x HG Hob Cleaner (500ml spray) How to use: 1. Spray on the induction or ceramic hob. 2. Let it soak into the cooktop for a few seconds then wipe away with a damp cloth. 3. Wipe the hob using a dry cloth or kitchen roll until the surface is dry and sparkling clean. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products, including HG limescale remover, mould remover, multi-purpose cleaners and all-surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Ingredients cleaner Box Contains 1 x Ceramic Hob Dail Cleaner 0.5L See more
